ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ecosystems" (
  "ecosystem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ecosystem */,
  "life_zone" TEXT /* Life zone of the ecosystem (e.g., Boreal rain forest) */,
  "unfccc_land_class" TEXT /* UNFCCC land class of the ecosystem (e.g., UNFCCC_FL_R_FL) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the ecosystem */,
  "area" REAL /* Area covered by the ecosystem in square kilometers */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the ecosystem record was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the ecosystem record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ecosystem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator (e.g., Annual Litterfall) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the indicator data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality rating (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the indicator record was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the indicator record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "ecosystem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ecosystem the dataset belongs to */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator the dataset belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range the data was collected for (e.g., 0-19) */,
  "flux_tc" REAL /* Flux value for the dataset */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality rating (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the dataset */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset record was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_ecosystem_id FOREIGN KEY ("ecosystem_id") REFERENCES ecosystems ("ecosystem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the user */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the version record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the role record was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
